session_note: S26 batch shipped. P0 = Voltkin Phase 2B physics + locomotion (Standard-tier Council R1 + Battle Ledger + PRIME-AUDIT 7 deltas + Triumvirate CHECK 0 code changes 1 documented trade-off). Bundle 458.30 -> 459.48 KB (+1.18 KB, 23.6% of +5 KB target; 79% headroom remaining). Tests 447 baseline + 19 new = 466 passing + 3 DOM-gated-skipped. Cumulative Phase 2 budget: S25 +3.30 + S26 +1.18 = +4.48 KB of +25 KB total Phase 2 cap; 40.52 KB headroom for S27 + S28. Council resolutions: Q1 caller-payload unanimous, Q2 hardcoded CREATURE_SPAWN_TICKS=60 (2/3 over Gemini's config-table for S29+ Anvil — carry-forward), Q3 inside-substep-loop unanimous, Q4 COMPROMISE combined public computeSteeringAccel + 3 exported per-behavior helpers, Q5 deterministic geometry unanimous + Delta5 ownerPlayerId*pi offset, Q6 pure unit tests unanimous, Q7 BOTH R1s cross-resolved by Delta4 ZERO_ACCEL during SPAWNING+DESPAWNING. CHECK Triumvirate 6 concerns: 3 REJECTED (architectural correctness), 2 ACCEPTED-AS-COVERED (existing tests + S28 deferral), 1 ACCEPTED-AS-DOCUMENTED-TRADE-OFF (G2 SPAWNING-zone-overlap — repulse during SPAWNING would reintroduce Gemini R1 Q7 momentum trap). Real-context tokens at close: 325546 / 1000000 (32.55% GREEN). Commit 902e430 pushed origin/master.

priorities.label: Voltkin Phase 2B physics + locomotion (creatureVerlet + steering + SEEKING transition + host-gated substep integration)
priorities.check_method: Standard-tier Council pipeline executed end-to-end: (1) A.0 STATE-DISCOVERY GATE verified 10 PDR claims against current repo state (verlet.ts pattern, creature.ts + creatureLifecycle.ts S25 scaffold, main.ts substep loop @ 673-699, host-gate @ 486-494 + 509, spawner constants, mulberry32 rng location, baseline 447 tests + 3 skipped, baseline 458.30 KB bundle, creatureVerlet.ts non-existent, blueprint S26 acceptance criteria 6 items) — zero state-vs-claim deltas surfaced. (2) Standard-tier batch PDR drafted in 8-field template w/ 21 explicit out-of-scope items + 12 ACs + 9 tests planned + 10 risks. User approved with 'approved! make sure to work methodically, technically, and thoroughly'. (3) PDR GATE fields written to session-state.json: pdr_approved=true + deliberation_completed=false (pending), tier=Standard, unlock_source=user at both top-level + per-priority. (4) Council R1 parallel via grok_chat + gemini_chat MCP: Grok grok-4.20-0309-reasoning (first call timed out at 120s, retry succeeded with condensed prompt) + Gemini gemini-2.5-pro on 7 questions w/ STRICT DECISION/RATIONALE/ALTERNATIVES-REJECTED/RISK/SKETCH per-question template. Q1 Q3 Q5 Q6 Q7 unanimous; Q2 hardcoded CREATURE_SPAWN_TICKS=60 (Claude+Grok 2/3 over Gemini's per-type config table — Gemini's config-table approach noted as S29 carry-forward when Anvil ships); Q4 COMPROMISE (combined public computeSteeringAccel + 3 EXPORTED per-behavior helpers seekForce/arriveForce/repulseForce). Hallucination check: all R1-cited symbols verified against verified excerpts; 0 hallucinations. (5) Battle Ledger synthesized: 2 real disagreements (Q2, Q4) + 7 cross-checks; deliberation_completed=true written. (6) PRIME-AUDIT 5-question adversarial pass yielded 7 additive deltas: Delta1 phase-through verified structurally (architectural separation — creatures NEVER in sparkArr/bondArr; freeSparkArray @ main.ts:629+668 iterates world.freeSparks only; bondArr is Array.from(world.bonds.values())); Delta2 per-behavior helpers EXPORTED (not private) for atomic unit testability per Gemini Q4 + Grok Q4 compromise; Delta3 17 new tests in creatureVerlet.test.ts + 2 in creatureLifecycle.test.ts = 19 new total (target was 8-9, exceeded for coverage); Delta4 computeSteeringAccel returns ZERO_ACCEL when state !== 'SEEKING' — single rule cross-resolves BOTH R1 Q7 concerns (Gemini SPAWNING+repulse momentum trap + Grok DESPAWNING substep drift); Delta5 stub target formula `targetPos.x = clamp(SPAWNER_CENTER_X + 360·cos(spawnedAtTick·1.618 + ownerPlayerId·π), 80, 1920-80)` prevents 1v1 simultaneous-trigger same-target convergence + canvas clamping; Delta6 per-type CreatureConfig table deferred to S29 (Gemini Q2 carry-forward); Delta7 IEEE 754 cross-engine cos/sin determinism resolved by S28 NetSnapshot v2 serializing targetPos. (7) Implementation: 1 new file (creatureVerlet.ts ~150 LOC) + 1 new test file (creatureVerlet.test.ts ~225 LOC, 17 tests) + 4 edits (creature.ts targetPos field + CREATURE_SPAWN_TICKS=60; creatureLifecycle.ts SpawnCreatureAction.targetPos + applyCreatureTick refactored increment-then-check for SPAWNING→SEEKING + extended SEEKING→DESPAWNING; main.ts imports + onCinematicHandoff computes deterministic stub targetPos + substep loop integrates creature physics after solveBonds before enforceSpawnerBounds; creatureLifecycle.test.ts targetPos threaded through 10 SPAWN_CREATURE actions + 4 makeVoltkinCreature factory calls + 2 new tests SPAWNING→SEEKING transition + SEEKING→DESPAWNING). (8) Gates: typecheck clean via npx tsc --noEmit (empty output); vitest run 466 passed + 3 DOM-gated-skipped via npx vitest run (baseline 447 + 19 new); vite build 459.48 KB main bundle via npm run build (delta +1.18 KB vs 458.30 baseline, 23.6% of +5 KB target). (9) CHECK Triumvirate: RALPH:PATROL self-audit (re-read creatureRenderer.ts confirms sprite.position.set follows creature.pos.x/y per frame — no regression) + GROK-ANALYST + GEMINI-AUDITOR via grok_chat + gemini_chat. 6 concerns surfaced: Grok C1 ticksInState off-by-one + same-tick spawn+tick race (HIGH — REJECTED: same-tick race architecturally prevented by CREATURE_TICK fan-out at main.ts:521 running once/physics-tick OUTSIDE substep loop + SPAWN_CREATURE only fires from cinematic timer never same-tick as physics; computeStubTargetPos seed and spawnedAtTick use same world.tick value); Grok C2 live Map iteration in substep loop (MED — REJECTED: no Map mutation in substep loop; only pos/prevPos mutation; auto-delete happens outside substep; Array.from would be YAGNI for S26); Grok C3 zero-initial-velocity test gap (LOW — ACCEPTED-AS-COVERED: end-to-end smoke test exercises realistic spawn→SEEKING path); Gemini G1 client locomotion desync (HIGH — REJECTED: intentional per blueprint Q6; host-authoritative until S28 NetSnapshot v2; client world.creatures stays empty per S25 Delta1 host-gate; Gemini's fix would BREAK determinism); Gemini G2 SPAWNING-state spawner-zone overlap (MED — ACCEPTED-AS-DOCUMENTED-TRADE-OFF: applying repulse during SPAWNING would reintroduce Gemini's own R1 Q7 momentum trap; Delta4 is correct cross-resolve; rare in practice because event.targetPos = chain centroid built away from spawner; trade-off comment added to computeSteeringAccel docstring); Gemini G3 increment-then-check fragile (LOW — REJECTED: applyCreatureTick atomic from caller; no in-between consumer). Net: 0 actionable code changes, 1 documentation update. (10) Browser boot smoke via preview_start at port 15842 + preview_eval window.__SPARK__.world.creatures probe: page loaded, world.creatures Map initialized (size=0), world.nextCreatureId=0, world.tick=0, world.gameState='TITLE', no console errors (only vite HMR + debug overlay message). Full SQ4-TR4 trigger gameplay smoke (AC11) deferred to user manual playthrough — same carry-over as S25 P0 since creature spawn requires live cinematic trigger. (11) Committed 902e430 + pushed origin/master 99f55b0..902e430. Real-context tokens at close: 325546 / 1000000 (32.55% GREEN — well under 500K YELLOW threshold). Bundle headroom remaining: 40.52 KB for S27 (target +8 KB) + S28 (target +18 KB code + asset). Zero regressions in 447 baseline tests; zero behavior change to Phase 1 cinematic; additive physics + locomotion infrastructure only.
